scripts.deploy:global: npm run build:global && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name movie-mogul-game
scripts.test:e2e: npm run install:browsers && bddgen && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run install:browsers && bddgen && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run install:browsers && bddgen && playwright test --headed
